intro: 7 hard problems that drill the Graph Algorithms pattern — ideal for focused practice sessions.

faqs.question: Why practice hard Graph Algorithms problems?
faqs.answer: Difficulty-scoped drills lock the pattern before you mix constraints on harder variants.
